commands.name: start
commands.description: Starts an interactive prompt for this sample CLI.

commands.name: roll

arguments.name: dice-notation
arguments.description:
Dice notation string to roll (ex: 1d20, 1d8+3, 
etc).

commands.description: Rolls the dice described by the notation string.

commands.name: notation
commands.description:
Display details about how dice notations are defined and 
written.
